description: This file is a Java class implementing core authentication logic, including registration, login, MFA verification, token issuance, refresh, and logout in a Spring Boot application.

classes.name: AuthService
classes.description: Service class providing core authentication features such as registration, login with MFA, token management, and logout.

methods.name: registerApplicant
methods.description: Registers a new user as an applicant, assigning roles, hashing passwords, and enabling MFA by default.

methods.name: loginStep1
methods.description: Validates user credentials and initiates MFA challenge if enabled.

methods.name: loginStep2VerifyMfa
methods.description: Verifies MFA OTP and issues authentication tokens upon success.

methods.name: issueTokens
methods.description: Generates access and refresh tokens for a user, storing the refresh token securely.

methods.name: refresh
methods.description: Validates and rotates refresh tokens to generate new access/refresh token pair.

methods.name: logout
methods.description: Revokes a given refresh token, effectively logging out the user.
